title: Junior Instructional Designer at British Council India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at British Council India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at British Council India Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About British Council India Digital Technologies:
British Council India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with British Council India Digital Technologies!
